name: tokscale-collection-tui-migration
title: Analyze tokscale collection and TUI migration
creator: lyh
notes:
2026-06-12: Implemented Phase 1 platform monitor registry/status/docs/tests and a narrow Phase 2 OpenCode DB discovery slice (OPENCODE_DB, channel DBs, legacy fallback). No parserless platform was promoted to SourceKind. Verified cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings, cargo test -- --test-threads=1, cargo run -- status, and npm --prefix docs run docs:build.
2026-06-12: Implemented Phase 4 TUI foundation slice: tokscale-style header/footer shell, tick/key/mouse/resize event handler, source picker overlay backed by platform monitor probes, source filter refresh, auto-refresh toggle, and TestBackend shell/source-picker coverage. Parser/store/source-id boundaries unchanged. Verified cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings, cargo test tui -- --test-threads=1, and cargo test --test tui_panels_prop -- --test-threads=1.
2026-06-12: Implemented a Phase 5 Daily/Hourly tab slice: renamed Sources/Projects display slots to Daily/Hourly, added dashboard-backed daily/hourly caches, tokscale-style token-channel tables/profile bars, and normal/narrow TestBackend coverage. Verified cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings, cargo test tui -- --test-threads=1, and cargo test --test tui_panels_prop -- --test-threads=1.
2026-06-12: Implemented a Phase 5 Usage/Sync tab slice: wired the Usage slot to Dashboard::sync_command_center, added a tokscale-style sync safety/source status/platform monitor panel, and added normal/narrow TestBackend coverage. Parser/store/source-id boundaries unchanged; verified cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings, cargo test tui -- --test-threads=1, and cargo test --test tui_panels_prop -- --test-threads=1.
2026-06-12: Implemented a Phase 5 Stats tab slice: wired the Stats slot to overview + 365-day heatmap + source breakdown + health payloads, rendered contribution/source mix/health signals, and added normal/narrow TestBackend coverage. Parser/store/source-id boundaries unchanged; verified cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings, cargo test tui -- --test-threads=1, and cargo test --test tui_panels_prop -- --test-threads=1.
2026-06-12: Ran broad validation after the Usage/Sync and Stats slices: cargo test -- --test-threads=1, npm --prefix docs run docs:build, and just ci all passed.
2026-06-12: Completed final TODO pass: added skipped/changed sync visibility, focused regression coverage, help/sync/daily-detail TUI affordances, and user docs for monitor-only platforms, token quality, and dash controls. Final validation passed: just ci.
